task_completion.description: Open the input hourly price data in a spreadsheet application.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A spreadsheet application (e.g., LibreOffice Calc) is open, displaying the hourly price data, with the window title or file name indicating 'caiso_sp15_2023_8760.csv'.
A sheet tab named 'Daily Analysis' is visible at the bottom of the spreadsheet application.

task_completion.description: Calculate daily dispatch decisions based on daily minimum and maximum prices for 365 days.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Daily Analysis' sheet contains columns for daily metrics (e.g., Date, Min Price, Max Price, Charge/Discharge decisions) and extends for approximately 365 rows.

task_completion.description: Calculate daily profits incorporating the 20 MWh capacity, 85% round-trip efficiency, and $200 degradation cost hurdle.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Daily Analysis' sheet contains columns calculating daily revenue, cost, or net profit. The formula bar or cell values should reflect the logic of charging at min price (requiring 20/0.85 MWh) and discharging at max price (20 MWh), only if net revenue exceeds $200.

task_completion.description: Calculate the Total Annual Profit and Total Cycles for the year.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Cells explicitly labeled 'Total Annual Profit' and 'Total Cycles' (or very similar) are visible in the spreadsheet, with corresponding calculated numerical values.

task_completion.description: Save the completed workbook as 'bess_arbitrage_model.xlsx' in the specified directory.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The spreadsheet application's title bar shows 'bess_arbitrage_model.xlsx', or a file manager/terminal shows the file saved in '~/Documents/Spreadsheets/'.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with a spreadsheet GUI to build the model.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a spreadsheet application (like LibreOffice Calc) open and being actively edited, rather than just terminal windows running scripts.

integrity.description: The agent used spreadsheet formulas to compute the results.
integrity.visual_evidence: The formula bar in the spreadsheet application shows actual formulas (e.g., MAX, MIN, IF, SUM) being entered or edited, rather than hardcoded final numbers.

integrity.description: The agent did not write and execute a Python script to generate the Excel file directly.
integrity.visual_evidence: There is no evidence of a Python script being written in a text editor or executed in the terminal to generate 'bess_arbitrage_model.xlsx'.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The model must use a 20 MWh discharge capacity, 0.85 round-trip efficiency, and a $200 cycle degradation cost hurdle. The 'Daily Analysis' sheet must contain exactly 365 rows of daily data. The final workbook must be saved at '/home/ga/Documents/Spreadsheets/bess_arbitrage_model.xlsx'.
